abc/ABCMeta/register.name: register
abc/ABCMeta/register.description: Register subclass as a “virtual subclass” of this ABC. For example: from abc import ABC class MyABC(ABC): pass MyABC.register(tuple) assert issubclass(tuple, MyABC) assert isinstance((), MyABC) Changed in version 3.3: Returns the registered subclass, to allow usage as a class decorator. Changed in version 3.4: To detect calls to register(), you can use the get_cache_token() function.
